---

## Environment

- **Unity version**: (e.g., 6000.3.14f1 LTSC)
- **Platform**: (Windows / macOS / Linux)
- **Scripting backend**: (Mono / IL2CPP)
- **Foxglove version**: (e.g., Foxglove Desktop 2.x / Foxglove Web)
- **SDK version**: (e.g., v1.0.0 or commit hash)

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Open ...
2. Click ...
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages, stack traces, or screenshots.

## Additional Context

Any other information that might help (e.g., special network setup, large scene, custom scripts).
